diff: Exposure to unapproved assets and/or futures products is not permitted, and incurs a collateral haircut rating of +100% / -100%. Long and short exposure to unapproved products will not be counted as offsetting each other. Frequent or significant exposure to unapproved assets or products may result in recall of the loan amount or liquidation of outstanding positions.
